items.title: China bypasses US GPU bans with 1.54-exaflops 'LineShine' supercomputer - CPU-only monster packs 2.4 million Huawei-designed Armv9 cores
items.summary: China's National Supercomputing Center in Shenzhen takes a page from Japan's Fugaku supercomputer and Fujitsu's A64FX processor, build LineShine supercomputer based entirely on Armv9-based LineShine LX2 CPUs.
